zh.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchill出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆。她於1599年1月14日與William Croscomb在英國戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1634年12月11日在英國英格蘭戴文林頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文托爾巴易希黑 布利哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchill出生在英国戴文格奧智哈姆。她于1599年1月14日与William Croscomb在英国戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1634年12月11日在英国英格兰戴文林頓，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文托爾巴易希黑 布利哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchill was born in Georgeham, Devon, England. She married William Croscomb on 14 January 1599, in Georgeham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 11 December 1634, in Lynton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Saint Mary's Church, Higher Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Lynton,: イギリスイギリスデボントルバイヒグハー ブリクスハムサイント マリ'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchillはイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた。1599年1月14日にイギリスデボンジョージェハムでWilliam Croscombと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1634年12月11日にイギリスイギリスデボンリントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスデボントルバイヒグハー ブリクスハムサイント マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Lynton,: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토르베이 히거 브리스함 세인트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchill(은)는 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1599년 1월 14일 영국 데폰 조그함에서 William Croscomb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1634년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 린턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토르베이 히거 브리스함 세인트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Marjorie Verchill родилась в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Croscomb 14 января 1599 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 декабря 1634 г. в местности линтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри'с чурч, хаиир бриксхам, торбеи, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
